	Li Yi in the novel and some old Koei games. The online Brewitt-Taylor novel calls him Li Yin.

full_text:
Li Yiqi 李意期
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Yiqi (李意期)was born in Shu. Immortal who warned Liu Bei what would happen should he attack Wu.
